title: TEN WORDS - BLOCK TALK BIBLE ( BTB translation)
body: # TEN WORDS - BLOCK TALK BIBLE ( BTB translation)

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
> # the function of word 2 is attempting to depict Yahweh's face, form, visual presence and appearance NOT simply leaving to go to other Gods ; that's logically baked in via stringency
> 
> ## concept
> The logical flow from word 1 to word 2 to word 3 to word 4 is revealed in preamble of Deuteronomy 4 verses 1 through 7.
> 
> - One flows into two two flows into three three flows into four.
> - There is a logical progression from discrete point to resulting discrete point.
> - the concept of male and female being embedded in the IMAGE of God is revealed in Genesis. the IMAGE of God is connected to his visually perceivable manifestation. This visually perceivable manifestation has MALE & FEMALE embedded into it. 
> - There is the additional belief that creation IMAGES/SHADOWS the Creator. This is not simply a monolithic principle, but a repeating, recapitulating principle at work in smaller & smaller spaces & instances in creation. e.g. the earth IMAGES/SHADOWS the heavens. Thus, with the ancients being aware of this principle, the following may seem to be a legitimate endeavor : for humans to attempt to reverse engineer visible creation to perceive/conceptualize/and ENGAGE with the invisible Creator.
> 
> 
> 
> ## reference
> Deuteronomy 4:15
> HB2 4:15 וְנִשְׁמַרְתֶּם מְאֹד לְנַפְשֹׁתֵיכֶם כִּי לֹא רְאִיתֶם כָּל־תְּמוּנָה בְּיוֹם דִּבֶּר יְהוָה אֲלֵיכֶם בְּחֹרֵב מִתּוֹךְ הָאֵשׁ:
> YLT and ye have been very watchful of your souls, for ye have not seen any similitude in the day of Jehovah's speaking unto you in Horeb out of the midst of the fire,
> LEB “So you must be very careful for yourselves, because you did not see any form on the day Yahweh spoke to you at Horeb from the midst of the fire,
> Deuteronomy 4:16
> HB2 4:16 פֶּן־תַּשְׁחִתוּן וַעֲשִׂיתֶם לָכֶם פֶּסֶל תְּמוּנַת כָּל־סָמֶל תַּבְנִית זָכָר אוֹ נְקֵבָה:
> YLT lest ye do corruptly, and have made to you a graven image, a similitude of any figure, a form of male or female--
> LEB so that you do not ruin yourselves and make for yourselves a divine image in a form of any image, a replica of male or female,

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
when would I say a face is in front of me but I can't see it? when the face is behind a veil.

when the face is masked or veiled

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
one of the ways to demonstrate the stepwise Logical relationship between each discrete word in the 10 words, one way to demonstrate that each word leads to another word is to pay attention to the last individual microcosmic word in each of the 10 sayings.

for example the final word "face" in saying 1 logically leads to the concept of depicting an image of that face which is saying 2.

excerpt: # TEN WORDS - BLOCK TALK BIBLE ( BTB translation)
